base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of locations_world_batch — a tile (level_layout) from 1994 final fantasy vi. World of Balance overworld + World of Ruin overworld + 30+ town/dungeon layouts (Narshe/Mobliz/Kohlingen/Thamasa/Vector/Zozo/Mt Zozo/Floating Continent/Phoenix Cave/Kefka's Tower). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World of Balance overworld + World of Ruin overworld + 30+ town/dungeon layouts (Narshe/Mobliz/Kohlingen/Thamasa/Vector/Zozo/Mt Zozo/Floating Continent/Phoenix Cave/Kefka's Tower)
